name: Chicken Italian (Low Salt,low Fat)
recipeInstructions:
1. Season with pepper to taste.
2. If using whole chicken, cut the chicken in half.
3. Blend marinade of olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, oregano, and dry white wine together.
4. Soak the chicken in the marinade for 10 minutes.
5. Bake in a greased pan at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 minutes to 1 hour, or until tender.
Serves 4.
